name: Argilla
pricing_notes: OSS self-hosted free; Argilla Cloud free tier (10K records); Pro $49/mo; Enterprise custom

auth.notes: API key from Argilla server; HuggingFace OAuth for Argilla HF Spaces deployment

performance.notes: REST API ~100ms; Elasticsearch/OpenSearch backend for fast record search; bulk operations efficient

agent_readiness.notes: Open-source data annotation platform for LLM fine-tuning and RLHF data collection. Python SDK + REST API. Supports text classification, NER, question answering, preference ranking (DPO/RLHF). HuggingFace integration for model+dataset workflows. Active LLM training data community. Actively developed for LLM alignment use cases.

gotchas: Requires Elasticsearch/OpenSearch backend (adds infrastructure complexity for self-hosted)
Argilla v1 vs v2 API breaking changes — ensure using v2 SDK
Self-hosted deployment on HuggingFace Spaces is easiest but has resource limits
UI is functional but less polished than commercial annotation platforms
best_when: LLM fine-tuning data collection with human feedback (RLHF, DPO)
Active learning pipelines where annotators label model predictions
Preference ranking datasets for LLM alignment training
Teams in HuggingFace ecosystem wanting native dataset integration
avoid_when: Computer vision annotation (use Label Studio or Roboflow)
Teams needing enterprise SLA without self-hosting (cloud tier limited)
summary: Argilla is an open-source data annotation platform focused on LLM fine-tuning and RLHF/DPO data collection. Python SDK + REST API. HuggingFace integration for seamless model+dataset workflows. Supports text classification, NER, QA, and preference ranking. Self-hosted with Elasticsearch/OpenSearch backend, or deploy on HuggingFace Spaces. Best for teams building LLM alignment training datasets.
